issues: The draft headline 'Team unity goal for Jets despite Olausson tensions' is fabricated — the OCR shows no standalone headline; the byline 'Stories by BRIAN SMILEY Sun Staff Writer' is present but was omitted from the draft.

The draft is primarily about the Olausson/Jets locker room tension story, but the page is a multi-article compilation by Brian Smiley covering Winnipeg Jets training camp — the Sockeyes-relevant content is a brief mention of Matt Hervey (ex-Sockeyes defenceman) wrestling with Brent Hughes during camp scrimmages, which the draft fails to highlight.

The draft's long description mentions 'McLlwain from North Bay' as a 'prospect' — while accurate to the OCR, this is secondary to the archive's purpose; the Sockeyes-relevant Matt Hervey mention is buried and not surfaced.

The draft describes the article as being about 'Winnipeg Jets GM Mike Smith addresses potential locker-room tension' — this is accurate for one section but misses the multi-article nature of the page and omits the Hervey reference entirely.
review.correctedDescriptionShort: Winnipeg Jets training-camp coverage by Brian Smiley includes a brief mention of defenceman Matt Hervey (ex-Richmond Sockeyes) wrestling with Brent Hughes during a scrimmage in Saskatoon.
review.correctedDescriptionLong: A multi-part Winnipeg Jets training-camp column by Sun staff writer Brian Smiley, filed from Saskatoon, covers GM Mike Smith's response to Fredrik Olausson's contract dispute, contract signings for Randy Cunneyworth and Greg Paslawski, and camp battles involving prospects. Of Sockeyes-archive relevance, the column briefly notes that spirited winger Brent Hughes wrestled with defenceman Matt Hervey — both described as former Moncton teammates — during a scrimmage in which Hughes scored twice to pace his squad to a 5-3 win over Dale Hawerchuk's club.
review.notes: The primary Sockeyes hook is a passing reference to Matt Hervey (ex-1987 Sockeyes defenceman) in the camp notes. The page date is September 1989, so this is a post-Cup career follow-up on an ex-Sockeye. The AI draft correctly identified the Olausson/Smith narrative but missed the Hervey mention entirely, which is the reason this scan is in the archive. Headline field left blank as no single clear headline spans the multi-article column; byline is Brian Smiley per OCR.
